text.message: How is black not the block???
I don’t have a good one on him
You’ve got a ton of options for gim
Why do you keep robbing me?
Does more than not blocking him at all!
He’s not gonna win this game
I don’t get this at all
that 8 is a v important block
Green is a knight flip from 7 with a city
Saying I don’t get this lol
You’re either not smart or table talking
Either way not gonna entertain anymore
I’ve got 5 with no devs, and black has 5 with 2 devs, so either he has 2 vp’s, or a backup knight
Lol wow that’s crazy! I never seen that coming lmao
You’re great at reading the table bro
And now I’ll lose army next turn, but yes, you know way more than me
Damn black, green is 2 roads from road
How many does black have green?
One of y’all have a mono lol
i cant win i dont have another knight
Blue thinks he’s the greatest to ever play this game
No I don’t, just better than u
he was right about you taking army
And you could’ve taken it right back, and still can
